title: Jia's Gadgets
shortDescription: E-commerce platform for gadgets with cart and checkout functionality.
longDescription: A full-featured e-commerce website for a gadget store with product browsing, shopping cart, and checkout functionality. Built with modern web technologies for a smooth user experience.

title: Billa
shortDescription: E-commerce platform for shoes with modern UI and fast performance.
longDescription: A modern e-commerce application for a shoe brand featuring product catalog, search functionality, and responsive design optimized for all devices.

title: EzClean
shortDescription: Cleaning service booking application with appointment scheduling.
longDescription: A service booking application that allows customers to schedule cleaning services. Features include appointment management, service selection, and booking confirmation.
